_meta.description: Master skill registry. Plug-and-play: add new skills here + SkillNameSchema + class options.
_meta.tierCostsDescription: SP cost to advance TO this tier (cumulative total = sum of all)
_meta.levelGatesDescription: Minimum character level required to reach this tier
_meta.tierMultipliersDescription: Proficiency bonus multiplier at this tier (0=none, 1=single, 2=double, 3=triple)

passive.name: Nimble Dodge
passive.description: +2 AC against opportunity attacks.

passive.name: Evasion
passive.description: Half damage on failed DEX saves, 0 on success.

active.name: Redirect
active.description: Deflect one attack to an adjacent enemy.

Animal Handling.description: Calm, control, or communicate with beasts.

passive.name: Beast Friend
passive.description: Beasts won't attack unless provoked.

passive.name: Beast Companion
passive.description: Tame one beast as a permanent companion.

active.name: Command Beast
active.description: Control an enemy beast for 1 round.

Arcana.description: Knowledge of magic, spells, magical items, and arcane traditions.

passive.name: Arcane Intuition
passive.description: Auto-succeed identification on Rare items.

active.name: Deep Analysis
active.description: 3 identification attempts per 24h instead of tier-based limit.

passive.name: Arcane Mastery
passive.description: Auto-identify all items on pickup (Rare and below).

Athletics.description: Climbing, jumping, swimming, and feats of physical power.

passive.name: Iron Grip
passive.description: Grapple and shove checks always have advantage.

passive.name: Unstoppable
passive.description: Climb and swim speed equal to walk speed.

passive.name: Keen Navigator
passive.description: Auto-reveal adjacent hex biomes on map.

passive.name: Master Cartographer
passive.description: Full map reveal within 3 hex radius.

Deception.description: Misleading others through words, disguise, or misdirection.

passive.name: Silver Mask
passive.description: No standing penalty on failed Deceive checks.

passive.name: Master of Disguise
passive.description: Disguise identity from all NPCs permanently.

active.name: Perfect Lie
active.description: Convince NPC of any single statement.

History.description: Knowledge of historical events, legends, and civilizations.

passive.name: Lorekeeper
passive.description: Codex entries auto-reveal monster resistances.

passive.name: Sage's Blessing
passive.description: +25% XP from all encounters.

Insight.description: Reading body language, detecting lies, and understanding motives.

passive.name: Truth Seeker
passive.description: Automatically detect lies in dialogue.

passive.name: Empathic Bond
passive.description: NPC disposition revealed on first meeting.

active.name: Predict Action
active.description: Learn one enemy's next action in combat.

Intimidation.description: Influencing others through threats, hostile actions, or physical presence.

passive.name: Menacing Presence
passive.description: Enemies below 25% HP have disadvantage on attacks.

passive.name: Terror Aura
passive.description: Enemies may flee when any ally drops to 0 HP.

Investigation.description: Searching for clues, making deductions, and analyzing evidence.

passive.name: Trap Sense
passive.description: Reveal trap presence passively when entering room.

passive.name: Sherlock's Eye
passive.description: Reveal ALL hidden properties of items passively.

Medicine.description: Diagnosing illness, stabilizing the dying, and tending wounds.

passive.name: Field Medic
passive.description: +50% HP from short rests (party-wide).

passive.name: Vital Ward
passive.description: Party gains temp HP equal to WIS mod after long rest.

Nature.description: Knowledge of terrain, plants, animals, and natural phenomena.

passive.name: Bountiful Harvest
passive.description: +50% gathering yields.

active.name: Herbalist
active.description: Identify unknown potions and plants for free.

passive.name: Nature's Bounty
passive.description: Auto-gather max yield from any node.

active.name: Commune with Nature
active.description: Ask one yes/no question about current area.

Perception.description: Spotting, hearing, or detecting the presence of something.

passive.name: Keen Senses
passive.description: +5 to passive Perception permanently.

passive.name: Blindsight
passive.description: Blindsight 10ft in combat. Can't be surprised.

Performance.description: Entertaining through music, dance, acting, or storytelling.

passive.name: Entertainer
passive.description: Merchant stock refreshes when you perform for them.

passive.name: Star Performer
passive.description: Merchants offer 20% better prices after performance.

active.name: Masterpiece
active.description: All allies gain +2 to all checks for 1 hour.

Persuasion.description: Influencing others through tact, social graces, or good nature.

passive.name: Silver Tongue
passive.description: Permanent +10% sell price at all merchants.

passive.name: Diplomat
passive.description: Unlock exclusive merchant stock tier.

Religion.description: Knowledge of deities, rites, prayers, and religious hierarchies.

passive.name: Divine Sense
passive.description: Sense undead/fiend within 60ft passively.

passive.name: Holy Ward
passive.description: Undead/fiends have disadvantage on attacks against you.

passive.name: Nimble Fingers
passive.description: Auto-succeed on disarming non-magical traps.

passive.name: Master Thief
passive.description: Disarm enemy weapons on critical hits automatically.

Stealth.description: Moving silently, hiding, and avoiding detection.

passive.name: Shadow Strike
passive.description: Advantage on all surprise round attacks.

passive.name: Assassin
passive.description: First attack from stealth deals double damage.

Survival.description: Tracking, foraging, navigating wilderness, and predicting weather.

passive.name: Pathfinder
passive.description: Always discover hidden paths on hex move.

passive.name: Wilderness Master
passive.description: Immune to getting lost. No random encounters while resting.

active.name: Tracker
active.description: Reveal all enemies on current hex.

Unarmed Combat.description: Fighting without weapons using fists, grapples, and martial techniques.

passive.name: Iron Fists
passive.description: Unarmed damage die increases by one size.

active.name: Stunning Strike
active.description: Stun target on hit for 1 round.

passive.name: Ki Strike
passive.description: Unarmed attacks count as magical for resistance bypass.

active.name: Pressure Point
active.description: Paralyze target for 1 round on crit.
